title: Irish Braised Fish Fillet
description: A deliciously tender and flavorful fish dish, cooked in a rich Irish-inspired stew.
instructions: Season the fish fillets with salt and pepper.
Heat the butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the onion, carrot, and celery to the skillet and cook until the vegetables are tender.
Add the mushrooms to the skillet and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown.
Add the flour to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add the whiskey (if using) and beef broth to the skillet, stirring to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 2 minutes.
Add the milk to the skillet and stir to combine.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and braise the fish for 8-10 minutes, or until it is cooked through.
Serve the fish hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs (optional).
Serve the braising liquid over the top of the fish, spooning it over the top to coat.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
